servinfo.title: Front Brake Pad On-Vehicle Inspection
servinfo.ptxt: Inspect front brake pad linings (1) periodically according to maintenance schedule and whenever wheels are removed (for tire rotation or other reason). Check lining thickness of inner and outer front brake pads.
If lining is worn and its thickness (“a” in figure) is less than the limit, all front brake pads must be replaced at the same time.
